---
title: "Stone Pine (Pinus pinea)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Pinaceae](/trees/family/pinaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Pinus*](/trees/genus/pinus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 129 - Stone Pine](../129.html) | SK: Darwin Centre Courtyard |
| [Tree 164 — Pinus](../164.html) |  |
